---
title: "Laurian Kaijage"
subtitle: "Marine Scientist | Ecological Data Manager | Conservation Practitioner"
image: image/profile.JPG
description: "Marine Scientist specializing in ecological data management and coastal conservation at Mwambao Coastal Community Network"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaijage-laurian-msc-73105617b?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lauriankaijage@gmail.com
---

## Welcome

I'm **Laurian Kaijage** — a marine scientist, field researcher, and ecological data manager working on the frontlines of coastal conservation in Tanzania. At **Mwambao Coastal Community Network**, I translate raw field data into conservation decisions that protect communities and ecosystems alike.

---

```{=html}
<!-- Impact Counter Strip -->
<section class="impact-strip">
  <div class="impact-counter" data-target="500">
    <span class="counter-number">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">People Trained</span>
  </div>
  <div class="impact-counter" data-target="50">
    <span class="counter-number">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">Communities Engaged</span>
  </div>
  <div class="impact-counter" data-target="347">
    <span class="counter-number">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">Ha Coral Zone Restored</span>
  </div>
  <div class="impact-counter" data-target="1300">
    <span class="counter-number">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">Artificial Reefs Deployed</span>
  </div>
  <div class="impact-counter" data-target="60">
    <span class="counter-number">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">Ha Mangrove Restored</span>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
function animateCounters() {
  const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.impact-counter');
  counters.forEach(counter => {
    const target = parseInt(counter.getAttribute('data-target'));
    const numberEl = counter.querySelector('.counter-number');
    const duration = 2000;
    const step = Math.ceil(target / (duration / 30));
    let current = 0;
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      current += step;
      if (current >= target) {
        current = target;
        clearInterval(timer);
      }
      numberEl.textContent = current.toLocaleString();
    }, 30);
  });
}

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      animateCounters();
      observer.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.3 });

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const strip = document.querySelector('.impact-strip');
  if (strip) observer.observe(strip);
});
</script>
```

## What I Do

::: {.focus-grid}

::: {.focus-card}
### 🌊 Field Research
Leading biodiversity surveys and ecological assessments across Tanzania's coastline — from seagrass beds to coral reefs and mangrove forests.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### 📊 Data & Analysis
Turning field observations into actionable insights using R,  GIS, and statistical modelling to guide conservation decisions.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### 🤝 Community Work
Building local capacity for conservation through training, engagement, and co-designing monitoring programs with coastal fishing communities.
:::

::: {.focus-card}
### 🎬 Media & Advocacy
Participating in documentary productions and science communication to amplify conservation stories from the local coastal communities.
:::

:::

---

```{=html}
<div class="cta-bar">
  <a href="impact.html" class="cta-btn primary">See My Impact</a>
  <a href="media.html" class="cta-btn secondary">Watch Documentaries</a>
  <a href="skills.html" class="cta-btn secondary">My Skills & Experience</a>
  <a href="projects.html" class="cta-btn secondary">View Projects</a>
</div>
```
